title: SomeRandomItem
description: A simple MOD which add some random item.
body:
Driven by a whimsy of sorts, I embarked on learning and crafting this mod.
This is my first time publicly releasing a mod, and there may be many imperfections.
So, what have I added?
- Infinite Potion: It can be used as potion, but it is more commonly used as an accessory. I have added the method to obtain the original effect, and you can also acquire other types through other means(like command,datapack...).
- Beacon In bottle: It provides you with those effects anytime, anywhere, just as you envisioned.
- Conduit In bottle: As above, and it can attack automatically.
- Infinite Golden Apple: Not only can they be eaten indefinitely, but they can also heal zombie villagers more quickly.
- Advanced Ender Pearl: Teleport directly to the location indicated on the map.
- Alchemy Bottle: Increases the duration of beneficial effects and reduces the duration of harmful effects.
- Uncommon Mirror: Return to the respawn point or death point.

You are free to use this mod in the mudpack.
I did not mix up the codes.
[Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) is required！
